calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-24-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arnold W. Evje, Esq. for Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority
Tim A. Pori, Esq. for Defendant
Sandra Davis Defendant

Settlement Conference held. Case settled.
Written stipulation for entry of judgment was read into the record as follows:
Restitution and Possession of premises to Plaintiff located at: 548 Alemany Blvd., SF, CA.
Lease forfeited
Defendant to pay Plaintiff the sum of: $2,331.00 for back rent and damages from 12/1/02 to 2/29/04.
Immediate writ of possession.
Defendant will be allowed to remain on the premises subject to the following conditions:
- payment of $100.00 to Plaintif or Plaintiff's agent at 938 Ellsworth St., SF by 3/1/04
- payment of the balance of $1,066 to Plaintif or Plaintiff's agent at 938 Ellsworth St., SF
in installment of $100.00, beginning on 4/1/04 and for the next 10 consecutive months.
- payment of the contract rent of $147 beginning 3/1/04.
- any money received by plaintiff or plaintiff's agent beginning 3/1/04 will be applied first to current rent and then toward the above arrearage.
Each party to bear its own costs and attorneys fees.
Jury trial vacated.
JPT: Andrew Westley, Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge
